final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing cinematic poster for a fantasy-romance film in the style of 1990s Hong Kong cinema, featuring two lovers embracing on a city wall.

Style/medium: 35mm film photography aesthetic, 1990s Hong Kong cinema poster style in the spirit of Wong Kar-wai and Jeff Lau — heavy film grain, slightly faded color, analog warmth
Composition: mid-shot centered on the embracing couple against the ancient city wall, wide enough to reveal two distant figures standing apart in the background, slight low-angle to emphasize the wall's grandeur
Subject: a young man in patchwork jester-like costume (至尊宝 archetype) and a ethereal woman in flowing purple robes (紫霞 archetype) locked in a passionate kiss against a weathered stone city wall; in the far background, a large imposing bull-demon figure (牛魔王 archetype) and a monk in white robes (唐僧 archetype) stand silently watching
Scene/backdrop: ancient Chinese fortress city wall at golden hour, crumbling stone battlements, vast open sky behind, dusty haze on the horizon
Lighting/mood: warm amber backlight from a low sun, rim-lighting the couple's silhouettes, melancholic and bittersweet romantic tension, soft lens flare
Color palette: warm amber and dusty gold dominate, purple accent from the woman's robes, desaturated teal shadows — palette feels sun-bleached and nostalgic
Materials/textures: heavy analog film grain overlaid across entire frame, visible halation around bright edges, slight color bleed at highlights, worn poster print texture
Avoid: CGI-clean renders, oversaturated colors, modern digital sharpness, watermark, generic wuxia poster clichés, lens flare as stuffer
